title: Interpolate a route parameter with ~p
prompt: Write a LiveView at lib/my_app_web/live/show_link_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ShowLinkLive) that renders a single <.link navigate={~p"/users/#{@user}"}>Profile</.link>. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :user, %{id: 42})}. Use ~H and <.link>.
tier_rationale: Single interpolation syntax in ~p. Canonical replacement for Routes.user_path.
